message:
refactor(deps): remove reqwest, use update_check module for release checks

Complete the update-check migration started in the previous commit by
removing the reqwest dependency entirely:

Dependencies (Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock):
- Remove reqwest (with rustls-tls, blocking, multipart, json features)
- Add tls-native-roots feature to asupersync dependency (needed for
  HTTPS requests via asupersync's HTTP client)

Update flow (src/lib.rs):
- Delete ReleaseInfo struct (now in update_check module)
- Delete latest_release_version_blocking() — the blocking reqwest-based
  release fetcher is replaced by update_check::check_for_updates()
- Rewrite maybe_prompt_for_update() to use check_for_updates().await
  and the UpdateInfo.should_show() API instead of manual version
  comparison
- Simplify the update prompt: use update_info.tag_name directly
  instead of formatting separate current_ver/latest_tag variables

Net effect: one fewer large dependency (reqwest + its transitive deps),
centralized update logic in the update_check module with proper cadence
persistence and failure resilience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
